description: Ai16z (AI16Z) emerged in 2025 on Solana as a satire-driven AI-venture-capital memecoin powered by viral humor, crypto irony, and community momentum. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 AI16Z gives original AI16Z holders and traders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Ai16z
